claim: Structured outputs (JSON schema constraints) guarantee valid parseable output, eliminating downstream parsing errors and hallucinations
actionable: Define strict JSON schemas for agent outputs; this makes tool-calling agents reliable in production
source_title: Coding RELIABLE AI Agents: Legit Structured Outputs Use Cases (Strawberry Agent?)

claim: Validation-execution-validation pipeline: validate inputs, execute, re-validate outputs; on failure, retry with refined prompt
actionable: Implement 3-step pipeline for agent reliability: validate input → execute → validate output; retry with better prompt on failure
source_title: Coding RELIABLE AI Agents: Legit Structured Outputs Use Cases (Strawberry Agent?)
